source: The Forever Winter shipping game files (build 24097213) — ItemDetailsData + EconV2 value tables, decoded with CUE4Parse
generated_note: Datamined straight from the game — authoritative and ahead of the wiki. Raiding-loot economy: scavenge-and-sell items, excluding weapons, parts, attachments, ammo, rigs and containers (own tabs); keeps enemy-drop destroyed weapons.
valueBasis: credits = round(raw Value / 1.9512195122) — the game's Rep-2 / 100%-cost-efficiency reference
